ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the political data */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, midterm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_data" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the sentiment */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the sentiment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the sentiment */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the sentiment data */,
  "thread_democratic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is democratic */,
  "party_democratic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is affiliated with the democratic party */,
  "party_republican" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is affiliated with the republican party */,
  "gender_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the respondent is male */,
  "democrat_perc" REAL /* Percentage of democratic sentiment */,
  "republican_perc" REAL /* Percentage of republican sentiment */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue being discussed (e.g., economy, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_data" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the polling data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the polling data */,
  "democrat_support" REAL /* Percentage of support for the Democratic party */,
  "republican_support" REAL /* Percentage of support for the Republican party */,
  "undecided" REAL /* Percentage of undecided voters */,
  "polling_organization" TEXT /* Organization conducting the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the demographic data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the demographic data */,
  "gender_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the respondent is male */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondents */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondents */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondents */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for the turnout data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the turnout data */,
  "total_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "total_voted" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated */,
  "percentage_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the affiliation data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the affiliation data */,
  "democrat_affiliation" REAL /* Percentage of voters identifying as Democrat */,
  "republican_affiliation" REAL /* Percentage of voters identifying as Republican */,
  "other_affiliation" REAL /* Percentage of voters identifying as other parties */,
  "independent_affiliation" REAL /* Percentage of voters identifying as independent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the election results */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the election results */,
  "democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by Democrats */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by Republicans */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "winning_party" TEXT /* Party that won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the account holder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., sentiment data, polling data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_results" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model used */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the forecast data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the forecast data */,
  "predicted_democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for Democrats */,
  "predicted_republican_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for Republicans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
